tools_used: CourtListener MCP opinion search and endpoint access
helpful: The snapshot exposed the extraordinary repeated-distribution history.
The complete questions presented and brief in opposition allowed balanced merits and vehicle analysis.
CourtListener MCP surfaced intervening related decisions without querying this petition's outcome.
Relist and paid-petition statpack cuts provided calibration.
gaps: Provisioned text for the docket's supplemental briefs would clarify the parties' treatment of Benson without requiring live retrieval.
notes: The MCP opinion endpoint was useful once search results supplied the underlying opinion IDs; one initial cluster-ID lookup correctly returned 404.
